creator: karl@Codebase.mcs.net
text:
The "cvsup" directory is not created when building a release
	or doing make world, causing install to fail.

Fix: "cvs diff" follows:
	


----McozigmavQcfkJTIGNQS1nbUPE0lGwZwHD9K6uAglsyo6RWg
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: BSD.usr.dist
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/cvs/src/etc/mtree/BSD.usr.dist,v
retrieving revision 1.63
diff -r1.63 BSD.usr.dist
145a146,147
>             cvsup
>             ..
How-To-Repeat: 
	None required
